purpose: Validate synthetic prediction reconciliation through CP1 bifurcation resolution, CP2 target-universe gating, oracle diff grading, and bounded dossier mutation without trading, advice, live market data, or provider authority.
authority_ceiling: synthetic prediction reconciliation fixture only; not trading, financial advice, investment advice, live market data, provider authority, performance authority, publication, release, or secret export
anti_claim: This fixture manifest accepts only synthetic prediction reconciliation mechanics and negative-case coverage. It does not authorize trading, financial or investment advice, live market data, provider calls, public prediction publication, release, hosted deployment, or secret export.

secret_exclusion_rules.live_market_data: forbidden; fixtures are synthetic and static
secret_exclusion_rules.provider_payload_bodies: forbidden; oracle refs are fixture ids only
secret_exclusion_rules.trading_or_financial_advice: forbidden; the organ validates reasoning mechanics only
secret_exclusion_rules.performance_claims: forbidden; oracle diff is a synthetic grading example
secret_exclusion_rules.private_source_bodies: forbidden; public runtime refs and source refs carry the non-secret substrate
